title: schizachyrium rhizomatum
intro: Schizachyrium rhizomatum, also known as the blue beard grass or little bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to the North American prairies. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Schizachyrium rhizomatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
